arts.ttl: Aston Villa XI vs Liverpool – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa travel to Liverpool looking to end a run of three consecutive defeats in all competitions. A calamitous error from Tyrone Mings condemned Aston Villa to a 1-0 defeat at Club Brugge in midweek, a result that followed last weekend’s 4-1 loss at Tottenham. Prior to that, The Villans were eliminated from the Carabao […] The post Aston Villa XI vs Liverpool – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Aston Villa – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Premier League leaders Liverpool host Aston Villa as they look to preserve their spot at the top of the table going into the international break. Liverpool’s resounding victory during the week over former midfielder Xabi Alonso’s Bayer Leverkusen saw them climb to the top of the Champions League table with a perfect record in Europe […] The post Liverpool vs Aston Villa – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Full Liverpool squad for Aston Villa as four miss out amid Arne Slot dilemma
arts.sum: Liverpool host Aston Villa in the Premier League on Saturday looking to extend their twelve-game unbeaten run across all competitions

arts.ttl: Liverpool willing to present an offer of £58 million to land 22-G/A forward
arts.sum: Liverpool are looking to improve their attacking unit with the signing of Eintracht Frankfurt striker Omar Marmoush. The 25-year-old Egyptian striker has been in phenomenal form for the Bundesliga side this season, scoring 13 goals in all competitions and picking up nine assists along the way. Liverpool are preparing an incredible offer to get the […] The post Liverpool willing to present an offer of £58 million to land 22-G/A forward appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen predicted XI vs Bochum: Xabi Alonso to rotate after Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso is expected to make several changes to his Bayer Leverkusen team that suffered a 4-0 defeat against Liverpool in midweek. The Spaniard could make three or more alterations…

arts.ttl: How to watch Liverpool vs Aston Villa: TV channel and live stream for Premier League today
arts.sum: Another big test for Arne Slot’s impressive Reds

arts.ttl: Ten things we've learned in Aston Villa's 10 Premier League games
arts.sum: No team has scored more Premier League goals this season from either crosses (six) or set-piece situations (five, excluding penalties) than Villa (level with Arsenal in both cases). Aston Villa have enjoyed an impressive start to the season after 10 league games as they sit one point off third place and are in the top eight of the Champions League table.

arts.ttl: 'I'm tipped to replace Liverpool's Mo Salah - Vincent Kompany can't believe how good I am'
arts.sum: A player who has already dropped the jaw of Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany is already being touted as a possible replacement for Mohamed Salah at Liverpool
